files_modified.changes_description: Added tsx arms to get_language_info (lines 112-127) and get_ts_language (lines 240-241) functions using tree_sitter_typescript::LANGUAGE_TSX and typescript:: query prefix
Added tsx extension mapping (lines 56-57) to EXTENSION_MAP and tsx entry (lines 90-91) to supported_languages function

compile_belief: The re-wiring is complete and should compile successfully when the lang-tsx feature is enabled. All four modification sites follow existing patterns in the codebase.
compile_belief_reason: All edits use the correct tree-sitter API (LANGUAGE_TSX), properly reference the shared typescript module queries, include feature guards, and maintain consistency with existing language support patterns for typescript and other languages.
